channel.title: Notes on Ren Zhenyu's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Ren Zhenyu's Website

item.title: Notebook for Applied Stochastic Processes
item.description: info This is a collection of my notes for SUSTech MA208 “Applied Stochastic Processes”, in the spring semester of 2022, based on Professor Zhang Yiying (张艺赢)‘s lectures and slides. Chapter 1: Preliminaries: Reviews on Probability Theory Probability Space Definition (Probability Space). The probability space $(\Omega,\mathcal{F},\mathbb{P})$ is defined as follows: $\Omega$: sample space, the set of all possible outcomes.
